title: Efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Scientific Summarization
abstract: We present a retrieval-augmented approach that improves the factual grounding of scientific summaries while reducing inference cost.

cited_papers.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
cited_papers.abstract: Combines parametric and non-parametric memory for generation.

cited_papers.title: Dense Passage Retrieval for Open-Domain Question Answering
cited_papers.abstract: Learns dense representations for efficient passage retrieval.

related_work: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks introduced combining parametric and non-parametric memory. Dense Passage Retrieval for Open-Domain Question Answering showed dense retrieval improves efficiency.
